title: VOTE!
content:
I just want to remind my readers that your votes still count.

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/misc/novote_banner.png!

No matter what happens, no matter how much you hate politicians, no matter how little choices there will be on the day, *please go vote.*

p(me). I base my statement on the assumption that there'll be a chance to vote.
